architecture_benefits.maintainability: Clear separation of concerns, SOLID principles

src_structure.domain: Pure business logic, no external dependencies

audit_findings.critical_issue: Dual architecture problem - both core/ (legacy) and src/openchronicle/ (modern) exist in parallel
audit_findings.maintenance_burden: Import confusion, boundary violations, circular dependencies in legacy code
audit_findings.target_state: Single src/openchronicle/ hexagonal architecture with clean dependency layers

critical_operational_issues.title: Test Infrastructure Interface Mismatches
critical_operational_issues.description: 41 failing tests with orchestrator interface mismatches blocking development confidence
critical_operational_issues.impact: Cannot safely refactor or add features without functional test validation
critical_operational_issues.next_steps: Fix CharacterOrchestrator, NarrativeOrchestrator, and ManagementOrchestrator missing methods

critical_operational_issues.title: Missing pytest-benchmark Dependency
critical_operational_issues.description: Performance tests failing due to missing pytest-benchmark package
critical_operational_issues.impact: Cannot validate system performance or run complete test suite
critical_operational_issues.next_steps: Install pytest-benchmark and verify performance test execution

critical_operational_issues.title: Redis Import Issues with Optional Caching
critical_operational_issues.description: Redis imports failing in optional caching features, no graceful fallbacks
critical_operational_issues.impact: System crashes when Redis unavailable instead of using local cache
critical_operational_issues.next_steps: Implement graceful Redis import fallbacks with local cache alternatives

critical_operational_issues.title: Relative Import Problems in Management Systems
critical_operational_issues.description: Import failures in management systems affecting orchestrator initialization
critical_operational_issues.impact: BookmarkOrchestrator, TokenOrchestrator, SearchOrchestrator failing to initialize
critical_operational_issues.next_steps: Convert relative imports to absolute imports, fix orchestrator parameter mismatches

critical_operational_issues.title: Missing Production CLI Interface
critical_operational_issues.description: No professional deployment interface available, fragmented CLI utilities
critical_operational_issues.impact: No unified way to deploy or manage OpenChronicle in production environments
critical_operational_issues.next_steps: Implement Phase 5 CLI framework after test infrastructure fixes

The codebase contains far more advanced character psychology, interaction modeling, and voice management than initially recognized. The truly missing features are innovative meta-analysis tools that would provide unique competitive advantages.
